name: Hawaiian Yam Bake
recipeIngredient: 8 large Sweet potatoes or yams - peeled and cut into 2-inch chunks
2 cups Hearts of palm - cut into 2-inch chunks
1/2 cup Honey or other natural sweetener
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large roasting pan or casserole dish.
3. Place the mixture in the oven and bake, covered, for 2 hours. Stir occasionally.
4. Serve hot.
Hint: For a sweeter taste, use apple juice to replace 1/2 of the vegetable stock.
Per serving: 531 calories; 22 grams protein; 460 milligrams sodium; 100 grams carbohydrates; 7 grams fat; 0 milligrams cholesterol; 82 milligrams calcium
Source: Vegetarian Gourmet, Winter 93/MM by Deanne
